Expression: Calendar(Date(Year(MIN('Effluent Flow Limits'[AUDITTIMESTAMP])), 1, 1), Date(Year(MAX('Effluent Flow Limits'[AUDITTIMESTAMP])), 12, 31))
Calendar(Date(Year(MIN('Effluent Flow Limits'[STARTDATE])), 1, 1), Date(Year(MAX('Effluent Flow Limits'[STARTDATE])), 12, 31))
Calendar(Date(Year(MIN('Effluent Flow Limits'[ENDDATE])), 1, 1), Date(Year(MAX('Effluent Flow Limits'[ENDDATE])), 12, 31))
Calendar(Date(Year(MIN('Effluent Flow Limits'[All Dates])), 1, 1), Date(Year(MAX('Effluent Flow Limits'[All Dates])), 12, 31))

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2],
    Filter('VARDESC', 
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef Flow MGD" || 
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef 2Hr Peak Flow GPM" || 
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt If Flow Mgd" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt If CBOD" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt If NH3-N" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt If TSS" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef FLOW Annual Avg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef FLOW Month Avg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Rainfall" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef pH Field" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef Dissolved Oxygen" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef CBOD MAvg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef NH3-N MAvg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef TSS MAvg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef CBOD 7-Day Avg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef NH3-N 7-Day Avg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef TSS 7-Day Avg" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="S Aer 01 TSS" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="S Aer 01 VSS" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="S Aer 01 VSS/TSS %" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="S Aer 01 Setblty, 30 Min %" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="S Aer 01 SVI" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="RAS 01 TSS" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="RAS 01 VSS" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="RAS 01 VSS/TSS %" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="RAS 01 Setblty, 30 Min %" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="S Clr 01 Wasting Hr/Day" ||
        'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="S Clr 01 Depth of Blanket"), 
    "CURVALUE", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
    "YEAR", YEAR('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]),
    "Month", FORMAT(Month('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]), "MMM")
)

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2],
    Filter('VARDESC', 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Rainfall"),
    "Plnt Rainfall", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
    "YEAR", YEAR('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]),
    "RainCat", IF(AND([Plnt Rainfall]>0,[Plnt Rainfall]<0.1), "No Rain", IF(AND([Plnt Rainfall]>0.5, [Plnt Rainfall]<1.0), "0.5-1.0", "GTE 1")
))

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2], 'LOCATION'[DESCRIPTION],
    Filter('LOCATION', 'LOCATION'[DESCRIPTION]="Round Variables for Reporting of Regulations"),
    "CURVALUE", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
    "YEAR", YEAR('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP])
)

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2], 'LOCATION'[DESCRIPTION], 'VARDESC'[UD1],
    Filter('VARDESC', CONTAINSSTRING('VARDESC'[S. Name 2], "Plnt if")),
    "CURVALUE", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
    "YEAR", YEAR('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]),
    "MONTH", Format(Month('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]), "MMM")
)

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2], 'LOCATION'[DESCRIPTION], 'VARDESC'[UD1],
    Filter('VARDESC', CONTAINSSTRING('VARDESC'[UD1], "Plnt ef")),
    "CURVALUE", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
    "YEAR", YEAR('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]),
    "MONTH", Format(Month('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]), "MMM")
)

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2], 'LOCATION'[DESCRIPTION], 'VARDESC'[UD1],
    Filter('VARDESC', CONTAINSSTRING('VARDESC'[UD1], "ChemA 01")),
    "CURVALUE", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
    "YEAR", YEAR('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]),
    "MONTH", Format(Month('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]), "MMM")
)

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2], 'LOCATION'[DESCRIPTION], 'VARDESC'[UD1],
    Filter('VARDESC', CONTAINSSTRING('VARDESC'[UD1], "Elec 01")),
    "CURVALUE", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
    "YEAR", YEAR('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]),
    "MONTH", Format(Month('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]), "MMM")
)

SUMMARIZECOLUMNS (
    VARDESC[WWTP],
    DATATBL[DATESTAMP].[Year],
    DATATBL[DATESTAMP].[Month],
    DATATBL[DATESTAMP].[Day],
    "Flow,MGD",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt Ef Flow Mgd" ) )
        ),
    "Influent BOD",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt If CBOD" ) )
        ),
    "Effluent BOD",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt Ef CBOD" ) )
        ),
    "Influent NH3-N",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt If NH3-N" ) )
        ),
    "Effluent NH3-N",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt Ef NH3-N" ) )
        ),
    "Influent TSS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt If TSS" ) )
        ),
    "Effluent TSS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt Ef TSS" ) )
        ),
    "RAS MLSS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "RAS" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "TSS" )
                    && NOT ( CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "%" ) )
            )
        ),
    "Aeration Basin MLSS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Aer" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "TSS" )
                    && NOT ( CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "%" ) )
                        && NOT ( CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Pr" ) )
            )
        ),
    "RAS MLVSS/MLSS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "RAS" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "TSS" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "VSS" )
            )
        ),
    "Aer MLVSS/MLSS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Aer" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "TSS" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "VSS" )
            )
        ),
    "Total MLVSS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Aer" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Inventory" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "MLVSS" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Sm" )
            )
        ),
    "F/M",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Aer" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "F/M" )
            )
        ),
    "SVI",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Aer" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "SVI" )
            )
        ),
    "Waste",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Total Gallon Wasted" ) )
        ) * 2.8,
    "Effluent pH",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER ( VARDESC, CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt Ef pH" ) )
        ),
    "Effluent DO",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Plnt Ef Dissolved Oxygen" )
            )
        ),
    "30 MIN SETT",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "30 MIN" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "Aer" )
            )
        ),
    "CBOD Removal Efficiency",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], " Efncy Pr %" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "CBOD" )
            )
        ),
    "TSS Removal Efficiency",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], " Efncy Pr %" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "TSS" )
            )
        ),
    "NH3-N Removal Efficiency",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], " Efncy Pr %" )
                    && CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], "NH3 N" )
            )
        ),
    "Sludge % SOLIDS",
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( DATATBL[CURVALUE] ),
            FILTER (
                VARDESC,
                CONTAINSSTRING ( VARDESC[S. Name 2], " Cake %TS" )
            )
        )
)

ADDCOLUMNS(
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'DATATBL'[DATESTAMP], 'VARDESC'[WWTP], 'VARDESC'[S. Name 2],
    Filter('VARDESC', 
    'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef Flow MGD" ||
    'VARDESC'[S. Name 2]="Plnt Ef 2Hr Peak Flow GPM"),
    "EfFlow_MGD_GPM", Average('DATATBL'[CURVALUE])
    ),
   "Year-Month", FORMAT(('DATATBL'[DATESTAMP]), "YYYY MMM")
)
